verses.text: When God restores Judah, He will gather all nations to 'the valley of Jehoshaphat' and plead with them for scattering His people. The Judge sits. God will call the nations to account for their treatment of His own.

When God restores Judah, He will gather all nations to 'the valley of Jehoshaphat' and plead with them for scattering His people. The Judge sits. God will call the nations to account for their treatment of His own.

When God restores Judah, He will gather all nations to 'the valley of Jehoshaphat' and plead with them for scattering His people. The Judge sits. God will call the nations to account for their treatment of His own.
Tyre and Sidon took His silver and sold the children of Judah to the Greeks. Trafficking in His people. God marks every wrong done to those He loves.
Tyre and Sidon took His silver and sold the children of Judah to the Greeks. Trafficking in His people. God marks every wrong done to those He loves.
Tyre and Sidon took His silver and sold the children of Judah to the Greeks. Trafficking in His people. God marks every wrong done to those He loves.
He will raise them from where they were sold and return the recompense on the sellers' heads. Just reversal. The oppressors reap what they sowed.
He will raise them from where they were sold and return the recompense on the sellers' heads. Just reversal. The oppressors reap what they sowed.
Proclaim war among the nations; let them beat 'plowshares into swords' and gather — to their own judgment. Summoned to ruin. The proud assemble only to meet God's sentence.
Proclaim war among the nations; let them beat 'plowshares into swords' and gather — to their own judgment. Summoned to ruin. The proud assemble only to meet God's sentence.
Proclaim war among the nations; let them beat 'plowshares into swords' and gather — to their own judgment. Summoned to ruin. The proud assemble only to meet God's sentence.
Let the heathen come up to the valley; 'put ye in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe.' Harvest of wrath. The ripeness of sin calls for the reaper's blade.
Let the heathen come up to the valley; 'put ye in the sickle, for the harvest is ripe.' Harvest of wrath. The ripeness of sin calls for the reaper's blade.

'Multitudes... in the valley of decision'; the day of the LORD is near; the LORD roars from Zion, yet is 'the hope of his people.' Two destinies. The same day terrifies the nations and shelters His own.

'Multitudes... in the valley of decision'; the day of the LORD is near; the LORD roars from Zion, yet is 'the hope of his people.' Two destinies. The same day terrifies the nations and shelters His own.

'Multitudes... in the valley of decision'; the day of the LORD is near; the LORD roars from Zion, yet is 'the hope of his people.' Two destinies. The same day terrifies the nations and shelters His own.
They shall know He dwells in Zion; the mountains shall drop new wine, and 'a fountain shall come forth of the house of the LORD.' Blessing flows. From God's presence streams life for His people.
They shall know He dwells in Zion; the mountains shall drop new wine, and 'a fountain shall come forth of the house of the LORD.' Blessing flows. From God's presence streams life for His people.
Egypt and Edom shall be desolate for their violence, but Judah shall dwell for ever, 'for the LORD dwelleth in Zion.' Enduring people. Those God indwells abide when their enemies are gone.
Egypt and Edom shall be desolate for their violence, but Judah shall dwell for ever, 'for the LORD dwelleth in Zion.' Enduring people. Those God indwells abide when their enemies are gone.
